creator: dor.bsd@xm0.uk
text:
Created attachment 200966
irc/irssi: Update to 1.1.2

This patch updates irc/irssi to 1.1.2. This is a security release.

Details of the security issues can be found at https://irssi.org/security/irssi_sa_2019_01.txt. The update also brings a number of regular enhancements which are detailed at https://irssi.org/2019/01/09/irssi-1.1.2-released/.
